body:
## Sprint
- Sprint ID: S09-gui-shell-setup-wizard-agent-switching
- Objective: Deliver macOS GUI shell v1 with Setup Wizard pins, run controls, and agent auto/manual switching UI model with operator-console navigation skeleton.

## Scope / Whitelist
- Touched paths: apps/**, src/**, scripts/**, docs/backlog/**, docs/sprints/README.md, docs/sprints/S09/**
- File-touch cap / budgets used:
  - Max net new lines in existing code files: <=120 (only scripts/preflight.sh changed in existing code; net new +3)
  - No function >80 lines (receipt in docs/sprints/S09/evidence/10_maintainability_receipt.txt)
  - docs/** exempt from line budget

## Acceptance Tests
- [x] AT-S09-01 Setup wizard + navigation + run entry
- [x] AT-S09-02 Manual switch + auto-switch reason log + continuity hash chain
- [x] AT-S09-03 Cancel + resume determinism from last checkpoint

## Evidence
- Durable root: docs/sprints/S09/evidence/
- EVD-S09-01: docs/sprints/S09/evidence/EVD-S09-01/
- EVD-S09-02: docs/sprints/S09/evidence/EVD-S09-02/
- Preflight: docs/sprints/S09/evidence/preflight/
- AT receipts: docs/sprints/S09/evidence/at/
- Gates: docs/sprints/S09/evidence/gates/
- Stoplight: docs/sprints/S09/evidence/stoplight/08_stoplight_greps.md
- Staging bundle: /tmp/promptops/S09/20260304_140939_31327

## Stoplight Marker Signatures
- dangerouslySetInnerHTML
- HYDRATION_ERROR
- HTTP 500
- UnhandledPromiseRejection
- TypeError
title: [S09] nav : gui shell v1 + setup wizard + agent switching
